# Central Saudi Area

**Summary**: The geographic region where the Khuff Formation outcrops are located.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-salih|Salih, 2022]] focused on carbonate samples from central Saudi Arabia.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2022-salih|Salih, 2022]] Arabian Platform

## Formations Present

- [[2022-salih|Salih, 2022]] khuff-formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- Outcrops of the Khuff formation occur in a North-South trending belt about 50 km wide and extending over 1200 km. ([[2022-salih|Salih, 2022, p. 46]])
